title: Externalize and bound automated build outputs
goal: Make Heim-PC automated Rust, Node, Python and browser jobs use managed external build/cache roots with per-producer keys and bounded retention instead of leaving multi-gigabyte outputs inside temporary worktrees.

approval.note: Source changes and read-only verification are authorized. Runtime deletion or cleanup effects require a fresh exact-target plan and post-readback.

acceptance.assertion: Automated Cargo execution resolves CARGO_TARGET_DIR outside worktrees using repository, toolchain, lockfile and profile identity.
Node, Python and Playwright paths are explicitly classified and do not create uncontrolled per-worktree copies.
A read-only guard reports worktrees with more than 2 GiB regenerable data and blocks new automated builds above 5 GiB unless explicitly pinned.
Existing interactive developer behavior is not silently changed outside managed operator jobs.

metadata.source: STORAGE-LIFECYCLE-V1 plan from live 2026-07-14 storage audit
does_not_establish: permission to bypass leases or dirty-state guards
metadata.readiness_basis: STORAGE-LIFECYCLE-V1-T001 verified by merged Heim-PC PRs #42 and #43 with live inventory evidence.
validation: 79 complete Heim-PC tests passed on the published final head.
GitHub smoke, guard and validate checks passed on the published final head.
JSON/YAML syntax, repository-index consistency, operator-entry validation and Metarepo contract validation passed.
Post-merge readback proved the merged main tree byte-identical to the tested final tree.

completion.outcome: Managed Cargo, Node, Python and Playwright jobs now use identity-bound external caches, bounded worktree guards and receipts without changing interactive shell behavior or authorizing cleanup.

verified_acceptance.cargo-target: CARGO_TARGET_DIR is outside worktrees and bound to repository, resolved Cargo/Rustc toolchain, lockfiles and profile.
verified_acceptance.other-caches: Node, Python and Playwright reusable stores are externalized and local projections remain measured.
verified_acceptance.guard: Inclusive 2 GiB warning and 5 GiB hard blockade are tested; only an explicit repository/tool pin of at most seven days can pass the hard blockade.
verified_acceptance.compatibility: The policy and operator contract keep interactive shell behavior unchanged and apply only to explicit managed-build entry use.
